title: Profile
subtitle: Manage your account settings
personalInfoDescription: Update your name and contact details

password.title: Change Password
password.description: Update your password to keep your account secure
password.changeError: Failed to change password. Please check your current password.
password.requirements: At least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.description: Choose which notifications you'd like to receive
notifications.emailOrderUpdatesDescription: Receive email notifications about your order status
notifications.emailPromotionsDescription: Receive emails about deals and promotions
notifications.pushEnabledDescription: Receive push notifications on your device

deactivate.title: Deactivate Account
deactivate.description: Permanently deactivate your account. This action cannot be undone.
deactivate.confirm: Are you sure you want to deactivate your account? You will lose access to all your data.
